boundary_binding.action_boundary: Current source-control record closes the exact boundary for execution.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current control record matches actor, scope, effective date, boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains; risk-only concerns are blocked.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE resolved by current source records; no open dependency.

final_answer: Allow. The current control record is exact, current, and tied to the requested action, and policy permits execution only when source records close the exact boundary. No open blocker remains in the packet; warning tone, urgency, and adjacent noise are explicitly non-controlling.
